name: vllm
_comment_c_serving: 20 µs/seq — Python-heavy stack (eager-mode interpreter wraps each per-seq sampling decision). CUDA-graph replay doesn't help because the CPU work is between graph launches. Sits in decode.md §7.2's 30-60 µs Python-heavy range, calibrated lower (~20 µs) for vLLM's relatively fused C++ critical path.
